titleStmt.title: SII 11.122: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 122. (B.K. No. 27 of 1927-28.) UṆACHGĒRI, ROṆ TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A STONE STANDING NEAR THE PUBLIC WELL.

summary.p: The inscription purports to belong to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and records the grant of a house to the god Kallidēva of Kūṇṭageyabīḍu, by four Gāvuṇḍas and of land and money by (the body of) the Thousand, to the gods Kallidēvasvāmi, Mādēśvaradēva and Kāmēśvaradēva.

The record is dated Śaka 994, Paridhāvin, Pushya, śu. 13, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti. The probable equivalent of the date would be A.D. 1072, December 23, Sunday. The tithi was not śu. 13, but śu. 11. It has to be remarked that the date of this record is almost identical with that of B.K. No. 33 of 1927-28 above, belonging to the reign of the king's predecessor Bhuvanaikamalladēva. (See foot note 2 on p. 110 above.)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . gaṇapatyāya namaḥ
© svasti śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalla
dēvara vijeyarājyamutterōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatā
raṁbaraṁ saluttamire . svasti samasta sakhavarśada 994 neya paridhāvi saṁvatsarada
puśya suddha 12 Ādivāra muttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyaṁdu śrīmatu kūṁṭage
yabīḍina śrīkallidēvargge māḷagāvuṁḍa nāgamagāvuṁḍa dāsagāvuṁḍa haḷḷagā
vuṁḍa Īntīnālvarggāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ cikkaṇapaṁḍitargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭa nakharē
svaradēvariṁ baḍagalu mene Oṁdu dēvara naṁdādīvigege miḷḷiseṭṭiya magaṁ kuḍiyamase
ṭṭi biṭṭa gāṇa Oṁdu mattaṁ kallidēvasvāmigaṁ mādēsvaradēvarggaṁ kāmēsvaradēva rggaṁ A(ṁ)ntu mūṟu
sthānakaṁ sāsirvvaruṁ biṭṭa dharmma Eleya hēṟiṁge bēḷe hoṟege bēḷe hottaḷekke vīsaṁ kāṇi
soppiṁge Aravīsa Aḍḍagāṟidēvariṁ paḍuvalu hūdōṁṭa mattaroṁdu dēvariṁ baḍagalu
Eleya tōṁṭa mattaroṁdu mattaṁ dēvara nivēdyake koḷḷada keṟeya keḷage sūṁḍiya
nāgēsvaradēvara gaddeyiṁ mūḍalu gade kamma 250 mattaṁ hakkanakeṟeya gaddeyiṁ mū ḍalu
keyi mattaru hanneraḍu .
Digital edition of SII 11.122 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
